title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Om Book Shop

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Om Book Shop
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
